response.justification: Bogdan's resume does not align with the core requirements of the role. While he has extensive experience in multiple programming languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, D, Java, etc.), his primary expertise is in web and mobile development rather than C++ or industrial automation systems. His lack of direct C++ experience, especially in high-performance, scalable, and secure systems, coupled with no mention of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443), makes him a poor fit for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with modern web technologies (TypeScript, React, Node.js)
Demonstrated ability to lead and mentor teams, as well as contribute to open-source projects
Proven track record of delivering scalable systems and optimizing performance in past roles
concerns: No direct experience with C++ or STL, which is a core requirement for the role
No evidence of working with industrial automation, IoT protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA), or message brokers
Lacks experience with secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 standards
